competitors.subheading: Every competitor was built for English-first markets and bolted on Arabic as a feature. ContentForge starts from the Arab brand experience.

jasper.title: vs. Jasper
jasper.desc: Jasper is enterprise-priced, English-first, and requires weeks of setup. ContentForge is affordable, Arabic-native, and generates a full calendar in 2 minutes.

arwriter.title: vs. ARWriter
arwriter.desc: ARWriter writes and publishes but has no calendar management, no RAG brand memory, and no image generation. ContentForge is the complete workflow.

postflex.title: vs. PostFlex AI
postflex.desc: PostFlex AI has limited scheduling and fewer templates. ContentForge delivers a complete AI-generated strategy with live cultural trend awareness.

branding.title: Brand Vault
branding.subtitle: Your brand's identity, voice, and memory - stored permanently in RAG.
branding.audiencePlaceholder: Egyptian millennials aged 22-35, urban, coffee enthusiasts...
branding.brandFontPlaceholder: Modern, clean sans-serif - e.g. Cairo font
branding.voicePlaceholder: Warm, friendly, and community-driven. We speak like a friend, not a brand...
branding.topicsIncludePlaceholder: Coffee culture, Egyptian daily life, Ramadan moments...
branding.topicsExcludePlaceholder: Politics, religion debates, competitor names, alcohol...
branding.uploadPostsDesc: We’ll analyze your past posts to help our AI learn and copy your unique writing style. Upload your top 10 best-performing posts with engagement stats. The more you upload, the better the AI learns your voice.
branding.uploadGuidelinesDesc: Upload your brand guidelines document. It will be parsed and chunked automatically.
branding.tpEmpty: No top posts yet. Add your best performing posts to improve AI generation.

cta.title: Start creating Arabic content
cta.subtitle: Join Arab marketing teams saving 2 days per content cycle. Your first calendar is free - no credit card needed.
cta.fine: A free trial · No credit card · Cancel anytime

features.heading: Everything your Arabic brand
features.subheading: Built from the ground up for Arab SMEs - not retrofitted from a Western tool.

arabicIntelligence.title: Arabic & Cultural Intelligence
arabicIntelligence.description: The only AI platform that generates posts in Egyptian, Gulf, and Levantine dialects - with automated cultural trend injection from X, Google Trends, and regional RSS feeds updated every hour.

points.p1: Egyptian, Gulf, Levantine dialect per post
points.p2: Ramadan, Eid, and regional holidays auto-detected
points.p3: Hourly trend scraping with velocity scoring
points.p4: Bilingual output - Arabic + English in one calendar

ragBrandVoice.title: RAG-Powered Brand Voice Memory
ragBrandVoice.description: Your brand voice is stored permanently in a RAG pipeline using Google Embedding API and MongoDB Atlas. Every generation pulls only the 4 most relevant chunks - so content always sounds like you, not a generic AI.

points.p2: Top 10 past posts vectorized and stored
points.p3: Context cut from ~15K to ~1K focused tokens
points.p4: Voice memory persists across all sessions

calendar.title: Interactive Calendar
calendar.description: Visual drag-and-drop grid with modal editing. Click any post to open a detailed editor, update statuses, and refine copy-all without regenerating.

imageGen.title: AI Image Generation
imageGen.description: Create ad visuals and social graphics from a text prompt alongside every written post. Black-Forest-Labs integration per post card.

abCritic.title: A/B Critic Agent
abCritic.description: Fires when you click a button in the edit modal to instantly produce a Version B with an alternative hook and CTA layout. Pick the winner in one click.

publishing.title: One-Click Publishing
publishing.description: Publish to Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and more. Set best posting times per platform and queue content in advance.

dashboard.title: Persistent Dashboard
dashboard.description: Plans saved permanently to MongoDB Atlas. Return daily to track, edit, and update statuses without regenerating anything.

workflow.title: Draft → Published Workflow
workflow.description: Built-in approval state machine: Draft → Approved → Scheduled → Published. Full team collaboration ready.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing for
pricing.subheading: No agency retainer. No complex setup. Cancel anytime.
pricing.bottomNote: All plans include Arabic dialect support, cultural trend injection, and a free trial. No credit card required to start.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: Explore the essential capabilities of our platform
free.f1: AI image generation for up to 3 posts

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: Perfect for growing creators and marketing teams

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.tagline: Maximum production value and custom toolsets for scale
enterprise.f1: Generate multiple AI images per post
enterprise.f5: Automated AI Reels generation per post

howItWorks.heading: From brand setup
howItWorks.subheading: Four simple steps to go from zero to a full content calendar - built around your brand voice, in the dialect your audience speaks.

s01.title: Build Your Brand Vault
s01.description: Tell Content Forge who you are. Upload your brand guidelines as a PDF, add your brand colors and font, describe your tone of voice, and import your top-performing past posts - manually, via link, or by uploading a file.
s01.b2: Import past posts via link, file, or manual entry
s01.b3: Set your dialect, tone sliders, and target platforms

s02.title: Write Your Campaign Brief
s02.description: Tell the AI what you want to achieve. Pick your campaign dates, choose your dialect and platforms, and describe your campaign idea in plain language. Content Forge handles the rest.
s02.b1: Choose any start and end date - no fixed duration
s02.b2: Select dialect: Egyptian, Gulf, Levantine, or bilingual
s02.b3: Pick your platforms: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, TikTok

s03.title: Review & Edit Your Calendar
s03.description: Your full content calendar is generated instantly. Drag and drop posts to reschedule them, click any post to open the editor - where you can rewrite copy, switch platforms, run an A/B critic, generate an AI image, and update the post status.
s03.b1: Drag & drop to reschedule any post
s03.b2: Edit copy, platform, and status from the post modal
s03.b3: Generate an A/B variant or an AI image per post

s04.title: Approve, Schedule & Publish
s04.description: Approve your plan in one click or post by post. Content Forge reminds you when a scheduled post day is approaching. When you're ready, publish directly to Facebook or Instagram - without leaving the app.
s04.b1: Approve all posts or individually per post
s04.b2: Get notified when a scheduled post day is near
s04.b3: Publish directly to Facebook and Instagram

visual.briefQuote: Ramadan campaign for our coffee brand - warm, community-focused posts for Egyptian audience across Instagram and Facebook.

hero.badge: Built for GCC brands - Arabic & English
hero.heading: Your brand voice,
hero.subheading: Content Forge generates a custom social media content calendar for your brand - any duration you choose. It understands Egyptian, Gulf, and Levantine dialects, learns your brand voice, and publishes directly to your platforms.

footer.tagline: Your brand voice, in Arabic & English in under 2 minutes. Content Forge generates a custom social media content calendar for your brand - any duration you choose. It understands Egyptian, Gulf, and Levantine dialects, learns your brand voice, and publishes directly to your platforms.
footer.taglineAr: صوت علامتك التجارية، بالعربية والإنجليزية في أقل من دقيقتين. يولد Content Forge تقويماً مخصصاً لمحتوى وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي لعلامتك التجارية - بأي مدة تختارها. يفهم اللهجات المصرية والخليجية والشامية، ويتعلم نبرة علامتك التجارية، وينشر مباشرة على منصاتك.
footer.builtWith: Built with Vue 3, Tailwind CSS, and Node.js

poster.title: AI Poster Generator
poster.subtitle: Upload your product image, describe your vision, and let AI create a stunning marketing poster in seconds.
poster.uploadHint: Click to upload or drag & drop
poster.promptPlaceholder: e.g. A luxury skincare poster with gold accents, soft pink background, elegant Arabic typography, featuring the product in the center with glowing light effects. Ramadan themed with crescent moon elements.
poster.emptyStateSub: Upload a product image and describe your vision to get started

tips.1: Use high-quality product images with clear backgrounds for best results.
tips.2: Be specific about colors, mood, and style in your prompt.
tips.3: Mention your target platform (Instagram, Facebook, etc.) for optimal sizing.
tips.4: Include cultural elements (Ramadan, Eid) for region-specific appeal.
tips.5: Try multiple variations to find the perfect poster.
